summary: Instant Quote Engine and Sales Command Center pack testing complete. All backend APIs (4 endpoints) and frontend features working correctly. Backend: POST /api/instant-quote/preview returns correct pricing breakdown (20% margin, 10% buffer, 18% VAT). GET /api/sales-command/dispatch-summary returns 4-column data. POST claim-lead and mark-followup work. Frontend: Customer Instant Quote page at /account/instant-quote shows Quote Builder with real-time preview. Admin Sales Command Center at /staff/command-center shows Uber-style dispatch board with 4 priority columns.
critical_code_review_comments: instant_quote_engine_routes.py correctly calculates margin (20%), buffer (10%), VAT (18%) with proper rounding
sales_command_center_routes.py correctly queries leads and quotes collections with proper date parsing for overdue detection
InstantQuoteBuilderPanel.jsx has proper data-testid attributes for testing
SalesDispatchQueueBoard.jsx correctly integrates with useSalesDispatchBoard hook and shows toast on actions
Minor: SalesPriorityCard has React key warning - children should have unique keys
context_for_next_testing_agent: Instant Quote Engine and Sales Command Center fully tested. Customer Instant Quote page at /account/instant-quote - enter base amount, click Preview, see breakdown. Admin Sales Command Center at /staff/command-center - 4-column dispatch board (New Leads, Follow-ups Due, Overdue, Ready to Close). Follow Up action shows toast 'Marked as followed up'. Note: New Leads column shows 0 because leads were claimed during testing - this is expected behavior with real MongoDB data.

Frontend - Instant Quote Page.Preview card shows breakdown: PASS - Base 500,000, Margin 100,000, Buffer 50,000, VAT 117,000, Total 767,000

Frontend - Sales Command Center.4-column dispatch board: PASS - New Leads, Follow-ups Due, Overdue, Ready to Close
Frontend - Sales Command Center.Real data displayed: PASS - 0 new leads, 9 followups, 0 overdue, 1 ready to close
Frontend - Sales Command Center.Follow Up button click: PASS - Shows toast 'Marked as followed up'
